overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student walking through a gothic castle corridor with stained glass ceilings, entering a dormitory with four-poster beds, exploring the room, and returning to the corridor. The scene features detailed stone architecture, atmospheric lighting, and medieval-fantasy interior design.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with vaulted stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated stone corridor toward the wooden door at the far end

entered.detail: arched ceiling with green and blue stained glass panes allowing diffused natural light
weathered stone brick walls with moss growth and gothic architectural details
decorative black iron railings with intricate scrollwork lining both sides of the walkway
medieval-style wall-mounted lanterns casting warm orange light
large arched wooden door with decorative metal hinges and stained glass panels
intricately patterned marble floor tiles with geometric designs

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor with a high vaulted stained glass ceiling. Stone walls line both sides with ornate iron railings, while wall sconces provide warm lighting. The patterned marble floor leads toward a large wooden door at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin house dormitory with four-poster beds and green drapery

events.description: character opens the wooden door and enters the dormitory room
character pauses and looks around the room while exploring the space

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and walking around to observe the four-poster beds, central heater, and room furnishings

entered.detail: dark wood four-poster bed with emerald green velvet canopy and curtains
ornate metal brazier with glowing embers providing heat to the room
stacked wooden trunks and chests with metal straps for storage
gothic stone archways supporting the high ceiling of the dormitory

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious gothic dormitory with multiple four-poster beds draped in green velvet. A central brazier heater glows in the middle of the room, and wooden storage chests are scattered about. The stone archways and warm lighting create a cozy medieval atmosphere as the character explores the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with vaulted stained glass ceiling

events.description: character exits the dormitory back into the stone corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the dormitory and walking back through the stone corridor with ornate railings

entered.detail: arched ceiling with green and blue stained glass panes allowing diffused natural light
decorative black iron railings with intricate scrollwork lining both sides of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory and returns to the gothic corridor with its vaulted stained glass ceiling. The ornate iron railings and stone walls are visible again as the character walks along the patterned marble floor, passing additional wooden doors along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin house dormitory with four-poster beds

events.description: character opens the wooden door and re-enters the dormitory room

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening the wooden door to re-enter the dormitory room

entered.detail: dark wood four-poster bed with emerald green velvet canopy and curtains
ornate metal brazier with glowing embers providing heat to the room
stacked wooden trunks and chests with metal straps for storage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches another wooden door at the end of the corridor and enters the dormitory once more. The four-poster beds with green canopies and the central brazier heater become visible again as the character steps inside the stone-arched room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow gothic corridor into a lavish dormitory before looping back through the hallway and returning to the room. It begins by gliding along a patterned marble floor beneath a vaulted stained glass ceiling, passing ornate iron railings and warm wall sconces toward a large wooden door. As the character steps through the threshold, the space expands into a spacious dormitory filled with green velvet four-poster beds and a glowing central brazier. The scene then shifts back into the corridor, retracing the path past stone walls and additional wooden doors before turning once more toward the end of the passage. Finally, the camera enters the dormitory again, returning to the cozy atmosphere of the stone-arched room and its canopy beds.
